changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "Not a question."
changes.before: Not a question. Jaina had lost patience for being anyone's most expensive tool weeks ago. "If the crossing needs one."
changes.after: Jaina had lost patience for being anyone's most expensive tool weeks ago. "If the crossing needs one."

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "No new orders. Only route, vessel, destination, departure hour."
changes.before: No new orders. Only route, vessel, destination, departure hour.
changes.after: Route, vessel, destination, departure hour.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "No answer. Only an object now, and still she carried it."
changes.before: Smooth surface. Dead chill. No answer. Only an object now, and still she carried it.
changes.after: Smooth surface. Dead chill. Only an object now, and still she carried it.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "The harbor did not break free in a single wrench. It loosened."
changes.before: Slowly. The harbor did not break free in a single wrench. It loosened.
changes.after: Slowly. The ship drew away by inches.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "What escaped Jaina was not quite a laugh, but it came close enough to sting."
changes.before: What escaped Jaina was not quite a laugh, but it came close enough to sting.
changes.after: What escaped Jaina came close enough to a laugh to sting.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "Not on skin. On the line of spell she had run out past prudence."
changes.before: Not on skin. On the line of spell she had run out past prudence.
changes.after: On the line of spell she had run out past prudence.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "They were not conquering distance. They were buying it by the hour with rope burns, soaked wool, and the body's increasingly sour cooperation."
changes.before: They were not conquering distance. They were buying it by the hour with rope burns, soaked wool, and the body's increasingly sour cooperation.
changes.after: They were buying distance by the hour with rope burns, soaked wool, and increasingly sour effort.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "The first proof of lateness was not the dock. It was the wreck above the tide line."
changes.before: The bay opened around a hooked point of stone, and the first proof of lateness was not the dock. It was the wreck above the tide line.
changes.after: Beyond a hooked point of stone, they saw the bay, and the first proof of lateness was the wreck above the tide line.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → line "Not from the sea this time."
changes.before: Not from the sea this time.
changes.after: This time the shaking came from inland.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "The harbor did not break free in a single wrench. It loosened."
changes.before: Slowly. The harbor did not break free in a single wrench. It loosened.
changes.after: Slowly. The ship drew away by inches.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "The answer came instantly."
changes.before: The answer came instantly.
changes.after: The headwind hit at once.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "a horizon that refused to hold still"
changes.before: Nothing came up over the lee rail. The nausea stayed lower, dense and ugly under the ribs, helped along by cold and exhaustion and a horizon that refused to hold still.
changes.after: Nothing came up over the lee rail. The nausea stayed lower, dense and ugly under the ribs, helped along by cold and exhaustion and a horizon sliding with the ship.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "as though the ship had taken command of the fluid inside her skull"
changes.before: Cloud lowered. Time lost its edges. Noon may have passed or failed to arrive. Cold settled into the joints. Once, when she blinked hard to clear her sight, the deck kept tilting after her eyes opened again, as though the ship had taken command of the fluid inside her skull.
changes.after: Cloud lowered. Time lost its edges. Noon may have passed or failed to arrive. Cold settled into the joints. Once, when she blinked hard to clear her sight, the deck kept tilting after her eyes opened again, the fluid inside her skull sloshing on its own.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "Yesterday the answer might have irritated her."
changes.before: Yesterday the answer might have irritated her. Now it only sounded exact.
changes.after: Yesterday she might have bristled at it. Now it only sounded exact.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "The neat sentence arrived at once"
changes.before: The neat sentence arrived at once—*I have made a habit of confusing cost with truth*—and Jaina rejected it on sight.
changes.after: She had the neat sentence at once—*I have made a habit of confusing cost with truth*—and rejected it on sight.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "The bay opened around a hooked point of stone"
changes.before: The bay opened around a hooked point of stone, and the first proof of lateness was not the dock. It was the wreck above the tide line.
changes.after: Beyond a hooked point of stone, they saw the bay, and the first proof of lateness was the wreck above the tide line.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "Taken together, the wood, the burned hull, the emptied camp edge, and the crust over old boot marks made the timing plain."
changes.before: Taken together, the wood, the burned hull, the emptied camp edge, and the crust over old boot marks made the timing plain.
changes.after: Jaina read the timing from the wood, the burned hull, the emptied camp edge, and the crust over old boot marks.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → line "It resembled a road already opened under snow."
changes.before: The northward pull in her head no longer resembled a line. It resembled a road already opened under snow.
changes.after: The northward pull in her head no longer resembled a line. It resembled tracks already cut under snow.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F2 / line "Cyndia almost smiled."
changes.before: Cyndia almost smiled.
changes.after: Cyndia's mouth twitched.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F2 / line "Jaina nodded once."
changes.before: Jaina nodded once.
changes.after: Jaina tipped her chin once.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3 / line "The near-laugh almost made it out whole."
changes.before: Closer this time. The near-laugh almost made it out whole.
changes.after: Closer this time. The near-laugh scraped out of her.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3 / line "Cyndia almost smiled."
changes.before: Cyndia almost smiled.
changes.after: Cyndia's mouth twitched.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3 / line "Jaina drew in air so cold it seemed to scour the lungs on the way down."
changes.before: Jaina drew in air so cold it seemed to scour the lungs on the way down.
changes.after: Jaina drew in air so cold it scoured the lungs on the way down.

changes.feedbackRef: self-audit → changed-passage micro-hunt
changes.before: Anything larger called the answer back harder.
changes.after: Anything larger brought the headwind back harder.
